faq.title: Have Questions? We Have Answers.
faq.desc: Our team is ready to provide you with the information you need. Find answers to common questions about our services, processes and how we can help you navigate government procedures with ease.

questions.q: What services does Al Garhoud Center provide?
questions.a: We offer a wide range of government services, including visa processing, Emirates ID typing, medical fitness applications, and various approvals from Amer, DET, and DHA. Our services also cover Taw-Jeeh for labor-related processes and Notary Public services for legal documentation.
Our center is open from 7:30 AM to 8:00 PM, Saturday to Thursday, to provide you with flexible and convenient service options for all your needs.

questions.q: Do I need an appointment to visit the center?
questions.a: No appointment is necessary for most of our services. You can visit us during our operating hours and our team will be ready to assist you promptly.

service_page.title: A World of Services at Your Fingertips

service_tabs.title: Dubai Health - DHA
service_tabs.content: Our expert team handles all your DHA-related needs, including medical fitness test applications, typing services, and securing necessary approvals. We ensure a seamless and efficient process, so you can meet your health requirements for residency and employment in Dubai without any hassle.

service_tabs.title: Typing Services
service_tabs.content: We provide comprehensive and accurate typing services for a wide range of documents. From visa applications and labor contracts to legal notices and official forms, our professional typists ensure precision and compliance with all government standards, saving you time and preventing errors.

service_tabs.title: Amer
service_tabs.content: Navigate the Amer system with ease. Our center offers a complete suite of Amer services, including new visa applications, residency renewals, cancellations, and modifications. We act as your single point of contact to manage all your GDRFA-related transactions efficiently.

service_tabs.title: DET
service_tabs.content: Streamline your business setup and licensing with our expert DET (Department of Economy and Tourism) services. We assist with new business license applications, annual renewals, and any modifications, ensuring your company remains compliant with Dubai's commercial regulations.

service_tabs.title: Taw-Jeeh Services
service_tabs.content: Al Garhoud Center is your trusted partner for all Taw-Jeeh services. We handle everything related to the Ministry of Labour, including contract processing, orientation, and awareness programs, ensuring both employers and employees understand their rights and responsibilities.

service_tabs.title: Notary Public
service_tabs.content: Access certified notary public services with convenience at our center. We assist in booking legal appointments, attesting documents, and obtaining government-certified true copies for all your official and personal needs, providing a reliable and professional experience.

service_tabs.title: Salem
service_tabs.content: We provide comprehensive occupational health screening and all required medical fitness services through the Salem system, ensuring your workforce complies with all health and safety regulations efficiently.

service_tabs.title: Golden Visa
service_tabs.content: Get expert support for UAE Golden Visa applications, including long-term residency guidance for investors, professionals and talented individuals.

service_tabs.title: Business Setup
service_tabs.content: Our team offers end-to-end assistance for setting up your new business in Dubai. From initial approvals to final registration, we guide you through every step of the process for a smooth launch.

service_tabs.title: Tax Consultancy
service_tabs.content: Stay compliant with our expert tax consultancy services. We provide professional advice and assistance for VAT registration, filing, and other tax-related obligations to keep your business in good standing.

service_tabs.title: Accounting Services
service_tabs.content: Ensure financial accuracy and clarity with our professional accounting and bookkeeping services. We manage your financial records meticulously, allowing you to focus on growing your business.

about_cta.title: We always want to connect with our clients
about_cta.desc: Al Garhoud Center makes government services accessible and beneficial for everyone and we look forward to assisting you in achieving your goals.

dha_page.header_subtitle: Medical fitness typing and all necessary approvals handled seamlessly.

faq.question: What is the DHA medical test?
faq.answer: It is a mandatory medical fitness test required for residency, employment, or visa renewal in Dubai. It checks for infectious diseases that may affect public health.

faq.question: Who needs to take the DHA medical test?
faq.answer: Anyone applying for a new residence visa or renewing an existing one in Dubai, including domestic workers, professionals, and dependents.

faq.question: What does the DHA medical test include?
faq.answer: Blood test (to check for infectious diseases like HIV, Hepatitis B & C) and Chest X-ray (to check for tuberculosis - TB).

faq.question: Is fasting required before the test?
faq.answer: No, fasting is not required for the DHA medical test.

faq.question: How do I book an appointment for the DHA medical test?
faq.answer: You can book online via our booking form on this page or contact us for assistance.

faq.question: What is Dubai Courts?
faq.answer: Dubai Courts is the official judicial authority in the Emirate of Dubai, handling various legal disputes including civil, criminal, family, commercial, real estate, labor, and inheritance matters.

faq.question: What services does Dubai Courts provide?
faq.answer:
Dubai Courts operate across three main levels:

Court of First Instance
Court of Appeal
Court of Cassation (Supreme Court level)

faq.question: How can I file a case in Dubai Courts?
faq.answer: You may personally visit Karama Business Center near Central Post Office Karama or enquire by using the above submission for or WhatsApp: 04-3991744

faq.question: What documents are required to file a case?
faq.answer:
Generally:

Emirates ID and passport copies
Legal documents (contracts, evidence, etc.)
POA (if filing through a lawyer)
Payment of court fees (varies by case type)

faq.question: Can I track my case online?
faq.answer: Yes.

faq.question: What kinds of cases are handled by Dubai Courts?
faq.answer:
Dubai Courts handle:

Civil cases (contract disputes, debt recovery, property)
Criminal cases (theft, fraud, assault, etc.)
Family cases (divorce, alimony, custody)
Labor cases (unpaid wages, unfair dismissal)
Commercial and real estate cases
Inheritance and wills

faq.question: Can I file a labor case directly at Dubai Courts?
faq.answer: No. Labor disputes must first go through the MOHRE (Ministry of Human Resources and Emiratisation) for mediation. If unresolved, MOHRE refers the case to Dubai Courts.

faq.question: How long does a case take in Dubai Courts?
faq.answer:
Timelines vary by case:

Civil/Labor: ~2–6 months
Family cases: ~1–3 months
Appeals or Cassation: Can take longer depending on complexity

faq.question: Can I represent myself in court?
faq.answer: Yes. In civil and minor cases, individuals can self-represent. However, legal representation is strongly advised for complex or criminal cases.

faq.question: What language is used in Dubai Courts?
faq.answer: All court proceedings are in Arabic. Legal documents must be translated to Arabic by a certified translator.

faq.question: Is legal aid available in Dubai Courts?
faq.answer: Yes. Dubai Courts offers pro bono legal aid for those who qualify (e.g., low-income individuals in specific case types).

tawjeeh_page.header_subtitle: All Ministry of Labour and Taw-Jeeh services handled professionally.

process_steps.title: Register for Tawjeeh
process_steps.description: We schedule your Tawjeeh session on your behalf.

process_steps.title: Document Submission
process_steps.description: Passport copy, Visa copy, Emirates ID (if available), Labor contract or offer letter etc.

process_steps.title: Select Language
process_steps.description: Customer chooses preferred session language (Arabic / English / Urdu etc.).

process_steps.title: Attend the Seminar
process_steps.description: Customer attends Tawjeeh class at the selected center. Duration: approximately 45–60 minutes.

process_steps.title: Receive Completion Certificate
process_steps.description: Completion is updated in the MOHRE (Ministry of Human Resources & Emiratisation) system automatically.

faq.question: What is Tawjeeh?
faq.answer: Tawjeeh is a MOHRE-approved service center that provides awareness and orientation services to employees and employers about UAE labor laws, employment rights, and responsibilities.

faq.question: What services does Tawjeeh provide?
faq.answer:
Tawjeeh centers offer:

Employment contract guidance
Offer letter issuance and signing
Labor complaints registration
Legal consultation regarding labor rights
Pre-employment orientation sessions
Attestation of job offers and employment contracts

faq.question: Who should visit a Tawjeeh center?
faq.answer:
New employees (for mandatory orientation before signing a labor contract)
Employers and PROs (for processing labor contracts and related services)
Employees facing labor disputes or needing legal guidance

faq.question: Is visiting Tawjeeh mandatory for all new employees?
faq.answer: Yes. For private sector jobs under MOHRE, all new expatriate employees must attend a mandatory awareness session before contract finalization.

faq.question: Can I get my labor contract from Tawjeeh?
faq.answer: Yes. You can collect, review, and even sign your labor contract at Tawjeeh centers after attending the orientation.

faq.question: Can Tawjeeh help resolve labor complaints?
faq.answer: Yes. Tawjeeh can register complaints and forward them to MOHRE. They also offer initial legal guidance and may help resolve disputes amicably before legal escalation.

faq.question: Is Tawjeeh the same as Tasheel?
faq.answer:
No.

Tawjeeh focuses on education, awareness, and legal advice.
Tasheel handles processing and typing of labor documents like work permits, contract modifications, etc.

faq.question: What documents are needed for Tawjeeh services?
faq.answer:
Generally:

Valid Emirates ID
Passport copy
Visa copy
MOHRE offer letter or contract (if applicable)

faq.question: What are the working hours of Karama Business Center?
faq.answer: Our center operate from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM, Monday to Saturday.

faq.question: Do I need an appointment for Tawjeeh services?
faq.answer: Usually, yes — especially for orientation sessions. You can book through the above submission form or Call/WhatsApp: 04-3991744

faq.question: Are Tawjeeh services free?
faq.answer: Most orientation services are free for employees. However, employers may be charged for contract attestations or other processing depending on the service.

faq.question: What languages are Tawjeeh services offered in?
faq.answer: Tawjeeh centers provide services in multiple languages including Arabic, English, Hindi, Urdu, and Tagalog, to ensure clear communication with workers.

solutions_area.title: Delivering the best solutions for you
solutions_area.desc1: Our mission is to empower residents and businesses with streamlined solutions that increase productivity, improve decision-making and drive growth.
solutions_area.desc2: Since 2008 we have been passionate about helping our clients navigate government processes. With a team of experts, we unlock your full potential and help you thrive in this dynamic city.

ceo_message: At Al Garhoud Center, our purpose is simple yet significant: to make government and business services accessible, reliable and efficient for every individual and organization we serve.

As a government-recognized document clearing center, we operate at the intersection of compliance, convenience and confidence. From AMER, DET, Tawjeeh, DHA and Dubai Courts services to tax consultancy, business setup and accountancy solutions, our role extends far beyond processing documents. We act as a trusted bridge between our clients and government entities, ensuring every interaction is handled with accuracy, transparency and professionalism.

In a fast-evolving regulatory environment, clarity and compliance are not optional, they are essential. Our experienced team remains consistently aligned with the latest regulations and procedural updates, enabling us to guide our clients with confidence and precision. Whether supporting entrepreneurs taking their first steps, businesses scaling operations or individuals navigating essential government services, we are committed to delivering solutions that are timely, compliant and stress-free.
As we continue to grow, our focus remains unwavering - strengthening partnerships, enhancing service quality and contributing positively to the business ecosystem of the UAE.
gm_message: With an established presence across the UAE, Oman, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, and Egypt, we work alongside entrepreneurs, SMEs and corporates as a strategic partner in business formation, expansion and ongoing operations.
Our regional expertise and structured approach allow us to deliver consistent, compliant and scalable solutions aligned with our clients' growth objectives.

As we look ahead, we remain focused on innovation, service excellence and continuous improvement, ensuring measurable value for our clients and stakeholders. Strengthening long-term relationships built on trust, transparency and performance remains central to our business philosophy.
Thank you for your continued trust in Al Garhoud Center.

single_blog_page.title: 10 ways to supercharge your startup with AI integration: unlock exponential growth
single_blog_page.p1: The rapid advancements in AI have paved the way for startups to revolutionize their businesses. This article explores 10 key ways AI can be integrated into startups and provides real-world examples of its tangible impact across industries.
single_blog_page.p_support: AI chatbots and virtual assistants can handle routine queries, troubleshoot issues, and guide users, improving response times. This frees up human agents to tackle complex tasks, enhancing user experience.
single_blog_page.p_maintenance: By analyzing usage patterns, ML algorithms can predict failures, enabling proactive maintenance and minimizing downtime.
single_blog_page.p_cybersecurity: AI anomaly detection, behavior analysis, and intrusion prevention boost security and data protection. This safeguards infrastructure and builds user trust..
takeaways_list: Start with chatbots, workflow automation, and basic analytics.
Gradually scale AI adoption as the business matures.
Identify the right AI use cases to solve pressing needs.
Integrate AI into workflows and processes seamlessly.
Get creative — leverage partnerships and talent from outside.
single_blog_page.p_final: The key to startup success is focusing AI efforts on the applications that will differentiate your business and have the biggest impact at each stage of growth. With the right strategy,
